faq.question: What is hyperinflation?
faq.answer: Hyperinflation is when prices rise more than 50% per month. It has occurred in Zimbabwe (2008), Venezuela (2018), and Weimar Germany (1923). It destroys savings and makes daily commerce chaotic.
